sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الطُّلَّابُ عَنِ الأَلْوَانِ فِي دَرْسِ اليَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su učili o bojama na današnjem času.
sentences.translationEn: The students learned about colors in today's lesson.

sentences.arabic: أَحْضَرَتِ المُعَلِّمَةُ صُنْدُوقًا مَلِيئًا بِالأَقْلَامِ المُلَوَّنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnica je donijela kutiju punu bojenih olovaka.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher brought a box full of colored pencils.

sentences.arabic: سَمَّى كُلُّ طَالِبٍ لَوْنًا وَأَشَارَ إِلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki učenik je nazvao boju i pokazao na nju.
sentences.translationEn: Each student named a color and pointed to it.

sentences.translation: Naučili su nazive boja na arapskom jeziku.
sentences.translationEn: They learned the names of colors in Arabic.
